query:
SELECT 
  b.id, b.clientName, b.ptsRef, b.status,
  ps.name AS currentStage,
  cc.id AS claimId, cc.status AS claimStatus, cc.claimedAt, cc.paidAt, cc.paidById
FROM bookings b
LEFT JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON b.status = ps.id
LEFT JOIN commission_claims cc ON cc.bookingId = b.id
WHERE b.id = 810001 OR b.ptsRef = '810001'
LIMIT 5;
